title: GOODWORKS - 211info
text: SOUTHERN OREGON GOODWILL JACKSON COUNTY WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT AND JOB CONNECTION GOODWORKS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers and on-the-job training program including life skills, computer literacy skills, and internsips. 11 W Jackson Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4pm Email (541) 772-3300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 772-3300 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jadckson, Josephine, and Klamath Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located downtown off of Central Avenue. Take a right off of Central Avenue onto Jackson Street and travel one block across the railroad tracks. Located on the left side of Jackson Street. Services: Job Training Formats Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - JOB CONNECTION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
